abilities.description: When you focus on a token linked to your companion- whether a carved charm or neural relay-roll +heart. On a strong hit, you are synchronized. Add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit when you use a companion ability. If you roll a 1 on your action die when using a companion ability, the effect is lost. On a weak hit, as above, but forming a connection is unsettling or destabilizing; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-1].
As above, and you may also perceive reality through your companion's senses while you make moves aided by them, even if apart.

When you or your linked companion suffers -health or -spirit, you may transfer the penalty between you [choose who suffers it for the move]. If you do, the link is disrupted until you next focus on the token.
